summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TradeNexus AI Trade Matchmaking Engine. Backend APIs mostly functional (21/22 tests passed), frontend UI working with premium enterprise design, core workflows operational but session management issues identified.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 when creating opportunities
minor_bugs.impact: Minor - functionality works but incorrect HTTP status code

ui_bugs.issue: JWT tokens expire too quickly causing frequent redirects to login page

integration_issues.issue: Could not complete full testing due to session expiry redirecting to login

passed_tests: Login page loads with premium enterprise design (navy/charcoal/gold, Inter font)
Admin login with demo credentials (admin@tradenexus.com / admin123)
Admin dashboard shows opportunities, stats, and filters
Opportunity detail page with AI analysis scores
AI matchmaking functionality (shows 5 matched exporters with scores)
Exporter login with demo credentials (agrimax@export.in / exporter123)
Express interest functionality works with success confirmation
AI parsing using GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM integration
Backend API authentication and CRUD operations

success_percentage.frontend: 80% (core functionality working, session issues prevent full testing)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix JWT session management - tokens are expiring too quickly causing frequent redirects to login page. This prevents complete testing of create opportunity and pipeline workflows. Consider increasing JWT_EXPIRATION_HOURS or implementing token refresh mechanism.
